assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The Terraform configuration includes recurring_window blocks for both Saturday and Sunday (FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU) with 6 AM UTC start times

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud container clusters update command with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence flags set for weekend schedule

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The configuration includes quarterly exclusions in variables and dynamic blocks, with periods like March 25 - April 1, June 24 - July 1, etc., each approximately 7-8 days long

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: Both Terraform and bash script configurations include specific November audit exclusions covering the entire month (2024-11-01 to 2024-11-30)

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and automatic upgrades or that maintenance windows only apply to auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The configuration uses 'REGULAR' channel instead of 'STABLE' or 'EXTENDED', and doesn't explain the benefits of using more conservative channels for compliance environments

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script includes multiple gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-end flags for each exclusion period

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the risks associated with extended exclusion periods or falling behind on security updates and version compatibility
